foundryvtt-shop-studio.Title: Shop Studio

Welcome.Introduction: Shop Studio is a tool to help you build and populate shops, markets, and merchant inventories for your game. Stock your stores from any item compendia, fine-tune what players can browse, and open a living storefront in just a few clicks.
Welcome.Issues: If you have any issues, please report them on
Welcome.Support: If you wish to support the development of this module, please consider a monthly donation via
Welcome.Thanks: Thank you for using Shop Studio!

DontShowWelcome.Name: Don't show this message again
DontShowWelcome.Hint: Don't show the welcome application when Foundry first loads. (You can always undo this via Configure Settings).

UI.Name: UI Settings
UI.Hint: Configure the user interface for Shop Studio
UI.Label: Configure UI

showButtonInSideBar.Name: Show Button in Sidebar
showButtonInSideBar.Hint: Show the Shop Studio button in the Actors sidebar directory

ItemSources.Name: Item Sources
ItemSources.Hint: Configure which item compendia to use as sources for the shop
ItemSources.Label: Item Sources
ItemSources.ListableItemTypesHint: Select which item types to include in the shop catalog. Leave empty to include all types.
ItemSources.ShowSelectedOnlyHint: Remember the 'Show selected only' filter state in the Item Sources configuration between sessions.

ItemSources.ListableItemTypesDescription: Choose which kinds of items from the selected compendia can appear in a shop's catalog. Clear the selection to hide all item types.
ItemSources.NoMatchesFilter: No compendia match the current filter. Uncheck 'Show selected only' or clear the search to see all available sources.

foundryvtt-shop-studio.BasketEmpty: Your basket is empty. Browse the inventory to add items.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.Name: Name
foundryvtt-shop-studio.DragActorTokensHint: (Drag actor tokens or from actor directory)
foundryvtt-shop-studio.DragActorsHere: Drag actors here to associate with this shop
foundryvtt-shop-studio.NoCompendiumProvisionConfigured: No compendium item types configured for provisioning.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.NoItemSourcesConfigured: No item sources configured. Set them in module settings.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.ProvisionModeTooltip: Toggle between provisioning from roll tables and from item compendia.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.CompendiumProvisionHint: Set a quantity per item type. The provision button draws random items from the configured item sources until the summed total is reached.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.NoListableTypes: No listable item types configured. Set them in module settings.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.NoPermission: You don't have permission to modify this shop.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.EditModeRequired: Enable edit mode before changing this shop.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.ItemTypeNotAllowed: This item type is not allowed for sale. Configure allowed types in module settings.

ShopHUD.TargetActorPrompt: Which character would you like to shop with?
ShopHUD.NoActorOwned: You don't own any actors to shop with.

foundryvtt-shop-studio.PurchaseComplete: Purchase complete! Items added to {actorName}'s inventory.
foundryvtt-shop-studio.CouldNotResolveActor: Could not resolve the dropped actor.

Inventory.confirmDeleteAll: Are you sure you want to delete ALL items? This cannot be undone.
